summary: M1 evidence manifest schema, validator, and resume scan helper delivered. JSON Schema describes manifest with inputFingerprint, files (with sha256 + artifactUri + retentionTier + compression), telemetry (bodyBoundary + residualProposalRefs), lifecycle action log. Python helper validates payloads, runs round-trip dump/load, and scans manifest-listed files to detect missing, duplicate, and hash-mismatch states.

artifacts.description: Manifest schema v0.1: required inputFingerprint, fileCount, files, artifactUri lake pattern, telemetry.bodyBoundary, telemetry.residualProposalRefs, lifecycle.actionLog.
Sample manifest with one harvested-page (zstd compressed), one evidence-seed, one body-boundary-residual proposal entry, lifecycle action log.
EvidenceManifest dataclass, validate_manifest(), load/dump round trip with atomic write, scan_manifest_for_resume() returning missing/duplicate/hash-mismatch report.
6 regression tests: fixture validation, missing required field, fileCount mismatch, artifactUri pattern, dump/load roundtrip, resume scan missing+hash-mismatch detection.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: manifest required fields (inputFingerprint, fileCount, files, sha256, artifactUri, updatedAt, schemaVersion)
acceptanceMapping.evidence: schema.required + per-file required keys + sample fixture; validator enforces presence.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: manifest records bodyStart/bodyEnd telemetry and residual proposal refs
acceptanceMapping.evidence: telemetry.bodyBoundary[] and telemetry.residualProposalRefs[]; per-entry bodyStart/bodyEnd + linkedResidualProposalId.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: resume scan does not require full tree walk; detects missing, duplicate, hash-mismatch
acceptanceMapping.evidence: scan_manifest_for_resume walks only manifest entries; smoke test passes with missing and hash-mismatch cases.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: manifest schema has smoke fixture and regression check

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0201: bind manifest artifactUri columns into PostgreSQL evidence-lake schema
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0202: repository adapter consumes manifest for resume + dual-write
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0204: parity gate diffs JSONL manifest sha256 against PG mirror
